chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1313 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Priority 1. For hearing of CMA No.6652/2025 2. For hearing of main case. 30-05-2025 Mr. Taimoor Ahmed Qureshi, advocate for the petitioner Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Deputy Attorney General SIP Illahi Bux of PS Gulshan-e-Iqbal Mr. Mukesh Kumar Khatri advocate files Vakalatnama and parawise comments which are taken on record. Pursuant to last order Mr. Muhammad Tahir, Assistant Commissioner Zone-IV, RTO-III, Karachi, is present and files reply to show cause notice which is taken on record. He states that the impugned notice, available at page 15, is being withdrawn forthwith. He states that a notice was issued to the petitioner on 07.03.2025 and reply to the same was received, available at page 17 of the court file. He states that the response shall be adjudicated and the department shall pass appropriate orders in accordance with law. In view hereof, learned counsel for the petitioner states that petition appears to have served its purpose, hence, may be disposed of. Order accordingly. The notice issued to the learned officer is vacated and his presence and assistance is appreciated. Judge Judge Amjad
